prompt: Create an authentic daily-life photographic image: a three-quarter full-body shot of a young East Asian Japanese woman in her early 20s standing alone on a residential rooftop at golden hour. Shoot from slightly below eye level at a three-quarter side angle, with her body turned left and her head angled slightly away from the camera; her face is intentionally anonymized by a centered rectangular warm-brown privacy blur covering the facial features. She has long, naturally straight fine black hair worn loose, backlit into a subtle amber halo, with two or three stray strands lifted by a light rooftop breeze. She wears a slightly oversized vintage-wash denim jacket over a plain white inner top, straight-cut dark trousers, and simple worn white sneakers; one hand rests in a jacket pocket while the other hangs relaxed at her side. Place her near a low concrete rooftop parapet, with one visible industrial outdoor air-conditioning unit in the left foreground and grey rooftop pipes adding realistic texture. The background is softly blurred residential rooftops and a distant city skyline receding into an orange-tinted horizon, with the low sun glowing at the far right. Use warm low-angle sunset light, amber-orange rim lighting along her hair, shoulder, cheek area, and jacket edge, natural shadows, subdued urban colors, realistic lens bokeh, fine film-like grain, and candid documentary realism rather than fashion posing. Vertical composition, full body visible from head to shoes, quiet contemplative mood, no text, no logos.
